description_long: This object appears to be a large, furry mammal with a robust body and thick limbs, covered in dark, shaggy fur. Its head is broad with a pronounced snout and visible mouth, and it has small, rounded ears. The limbs are powerful and end in large paws, suggesting a strong terrestrial animal. There are several elongated, angular, and fragmented structures protruding from its back and sides, which may be visual artifacts or damaged geometry. The overall form is hunched, with the body close to the ground and the head slightly forward. The coloration is predominantly dark brown to black, with some lighter highlights on the fur.
description: A large, dark-furred mammal with a broad head, thick limbs, and shaggy coat, featuring angular protrusions from its back.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the animal's face, broad snout, and thick, furry forelimbs, with angular structures extending from the back.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the hunched posture, powerful limbs, and the extent of the angular protrusions from the back.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back legs and the dense fur, with the angular structures more prominent above the body.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the animal's profile, the shaggy fur, and the fragmented extensions from the back.
